title: Skills gap: document MC task gate and Drive Drafts shortcuts
description: First action: add a compact named-shortcut section to `TOOLS.md` or a micro-skill covering `scripts/mission_control_task_gate.py` and `scripts/drive_drafts.py` with exact command examples and duplicate/upload guardrails. Why it matters: these scripts are called often enough that crons should stop reinventing syntax and should use the same safe path every time. Done: shortcut documentation exists, includes examples, and points crons to the script-file path instead of inline parsing.
